data.body: SECOND OCCURRENCE: Same CONTROL_LOSS observed after /dso:implementation-plan for story 743c-c1c9 (Layer 0, second story). Skill emitted STATUS:complete TASKS:71a4-8622,d7b0-a0b7,ab1e-24ed,b6bb-b831,ccae-5ef1 STORY:743c-c1c9 but sprint orchestrator did not resume. User had to manually say 'continue' again. Session state at failure: Phase 2 Implementation Planning Gate, Layer 0 complete (dd09-c73e + 743c-c1c9 both planned), Layer 1 (8130-9a5d) and Layer 2 (c896-32f1) still pending. This is now a reproducible pattern — every /dso:implementation-plan invocation via Skill tool in this session has failed to return control. Context load is higher than first occurrence (two full impl-plan cycles completed, ~2 decision-maker dispatches each). The ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME directive in sprint SKILL.md is consistently ineffective.
